title: AP Registration/Sign in from Y4J Hub - Functional Test Plan
author: QA Automation
overview: Functional testing of the Assistive Partner (AP) Registration and Sign-in flow from Y4J Hub portal. Covers registration link access, SSO login, registration form fields, OTP verification (email & mobile), form validation, submission confirmation, admin notification, duplicate handling, accessibility standards, and post-submission workflow.

inScope: Registration form mandatory and optional fields
OTP verification for email and mobile
Keyboard navigation and screen reader support

testEnvironment.url: Y4J Hub Portal and PwD Catalog Portal
prerequisites: Valid phone number for OTP testing

testCases.title: Verify Register as Assistive Partner link is visible on Y4J Hub
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Access and Navigation for Registration
testCases.preconditions: User is on Y4J Hub portal homepage
steps: Verify 'Register as Assistive Partner' link is visible
expectedResults: 'Register as Assistive Partner' link is clearly visible

testCases.title: Verify Register link redirects to AP Registration page
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Access and Navigation for Registration
testCases.preconditions: User is on Y4J Hub portal
steps: Verify landing on AP Registration page of PwD Catalog portal
expectedResults: AP Registration page of PwD Catalog portal is displayed

testCases.title: Verify Sign in with Swarajability link is visible
testCases.preconditions: User is on Y4J Hub portal
steps: Verify 'Sign in with Swarajability' link is visible
expectedResults: 'Sign in with Swarajability' link is clearly visible

testCases.title: Verify SSO login navigates to AP Dashboard
testCases.preconditions: User has existing Swarajability account
expectedResults: User lands on Assistive Partner Portal dashboard
testCases.postconditions: User is logged in and on dashboard

testCases.title: Verify registration form displays all mandatory fields
testCases.preconditions: User is on AP Registration page
steps: Verify Organization Name field is present
Verify Type of Organization dropdown is present
Verify Contact Person Name field is present
Verify Official Email ID field is present
Verify Phone Number field is present
Verify Registered Address section is present
Verify Short Description of Offerings field is present
expectedResults: Organization Name field is visible and marked required
Type of Organization dropdown is visible with options
Contact Person Name field is visible and marked required
Official Email ID field is visible and marked required
Phone Number field is visible and marked required
Registered Address section is visible with all sub-fields
Short Description field is visible and marked required

testCases.title: Verify Type of Organization dropdown options
testCases.preconditions: User is on AP Registration page
steps: Verify all organization types are listed
expectedResults: Options include: Manufacturer, Distributor, NGO, Service Provider

testCases.title: Verify Send OTP button for Email field
testCases.preconditions: User is on AP Registration page
steps: Enter valid email in Official Email ID field
Locate Send OTP button for email
expectedResults: OTP is sent to entered email

testCases.title: Verify Send OTP button for Phone Number field
testCases.preconditions: User is on AP Registration page
steps: Enter valid phone number in Phone Number field
Locate Send OTP button for phone
expectedResults: OTP is sent to entered mobile number

testCases.title: Verify OTP input field appears after OTP is sent
testCases.preconditions: User has clicked Send OTP
steps: Enter valid email and click Send OTP
expectedResults: UI updates to show OTP input
OTP input field is visible and ready for input

testCases.title: Verify successful OTP verification marks field as Verified
testCases.preconditions: User has received valid OTP
expectedResults: OTP input section is disabled or hidden

testCases.title: Verify expired OTP shows appropriate error message
testCases.preconditions: User has received OTP and waited for expiry
steps: Wait for OTP expiry time window
expectedResults: Appropriate error message is shown (e.g., 'OTP has expired')

testCases.title: Verify registration cannot be submitted without both verifications
testCases.preconditions: User has filled all form fields
expectedResults: Submission is blocked with only email verified
Submission is blocked with only mobile verified
Both verifications are required for submission

testCases.title: Verify form validates all required fields before submission
testCases.preconditions: User is on AP Registration page
steps: Verify validation errors for each required field
expectedResults: Validation errors appear for all required fields

testCases.title: Verify error messages for missing required fields
testCases.preconditions: User is on AP Registration page
steps: Leave Organization Name empty and submit
Leave Contact Person Name empty and submit
expectedResults: Error message for Contact Person Name
All error messages are clear and specific

testCases.title: Verify invalid email format validation
testCases.preconditions: User is on AP Registration page
expectedResults: Error message indicates invalid email format
Send OTP is blocked for invalid email

testCases.title: Verify invalid phone number validation
testCases.preconditions: User is on AP Registration page
steps: Enter phone number with less than required digits
Enter phone number with alphabetic characters
expectedResults: Error message indicates invalid phone format
Send OTP is blocked for invalid phone

testCases.title: Verify duplicate email message provides login option
testCases.preconditions: User sees duplicate email error
steps: Verify contact support option is mentioned
expectedResults: Contact Y4J support option is mentioned

testCases.title: Verify all form fields have proper labels
testCases.preconditions: User is on AP Registration page
steps: Verify label is associated with field
expectedResults: Labels are programmatically linked to fields

testCases.title: Verify clear error prompts for validation
testCases.preconditions: User triggers validation errors
steps: Check error messages are associated with fields
Verify errors are announced by screen reader
expectedResults: Errors are linked to respective fields

testCases.title: Verify registration page supports keyboard navigation
testCases.preconditions: User is on AP Registration page
steps: Navigate using Tab key through all fields
expectedResults: Form can be completed without mouse

testCases.title: Verify focus indicators are visible on all interactive elements
testCases.preconditions: User is navigating with keyboard
expectedResults: Focus indicators are visible on all elements

testCases.title: Verify complete registration flow end-to-end
testCases.preconditions: User is new and not registered

testCases.title: Verify Short Description of Offerings field accepts text
testCases.preconditions: User is on AP Registration page
steps: Locate Short Description of Offerings field
Check for character limit if any
expectedResults: Character limit is enforced if applicable

testCases.title: Verify Website/Social Media Links field accepts valid URLs
testCases.preconditions: User is on AP Registration page
expectedResults: Field is optional (no error when empty)

traceabilityMatrix.AC7_Admin_Notification: Out of Scope - Requires Admin Access
traceabilityMatrix.AC10_Post_Submission_Workflow: Out of Scope - Requires Admin Access

userAccounts: Existing user registered on Swarajability platform
User with already registered email (for duplicate testing)
formData: Organization types: Manufacturer, Distributor, NGO, Service Provider
Valid email addresses for OTP testing
Valid phone numbers for OTP testing
fileAssets: Invalid file types for error testing

assumptions: OTP service is operational for email and SMS
Test email accounts can receive OTPs
Test phone numbers can receive SMS OTPs
risks: OTP delivery may be delayed affecting test execution
SSO integration depends on Swarajability platform availability
Rate limiting may affect repeated OTP testing
Email delivery testing requires access to email inbox
openQuestions: What is the OTP expiry time window?
What are the rate limits for Resend OTP?
Is phone number also unique like email for duplicate detection?
Which admin users receive the notification email?
What file types and sizes are accepted for logo/certificate upload?
notesFromComments: Question raised: Will all admin users receive notification or specific criteria? (Unanswered)
Question raised: Is only email unique or also phone number? (Unanswered)
